reviews.review_description: When I first bought this game, i already knew that this would be one of my favorite games. It’s really fun playing in key moments from the premier league last season and to experience every premier league stadium. Great game 👍🏼

The goalkeeper doesnt jump into corners, no matter what i do. I saw the focus was on tactics, and immersive gameplay, and not like fifa. That immersive thing is just horrible to me, others might enjoy it though. I would have found it nice if only the goalkeeper would be working and jump into corners.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback, we really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

We’re sorry to hear you’ve had issues with the goalkeeper movement, particularly when trying to reach shots into the corners. The gameplay is designed around realistic positioning and timing rather than assisted or pre-set animations, which can feel different compared to traditional football games. That said, the goalkeeper should be able to reach those shots when positioned and timed correctly, so this doesn’t sound like the experience we want players to have.

We’d love to understand this better and help. If you’re able to share more detail (for example which mode you were playing or what situation this happened in), please reach out to our support team or share it in our community so we can investigate further.

Your feedback is valuable and helps us continue improving the experience for everyone.

Best, 
Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description:
it should be free to play league games like i know they are trying to make money off of there game but you know there are kids that wanna have that pro feel that is free
besides that it's pretty fun

The physics in this game are so terrible they expect you to be 6'6 foot tall to practice shot stopping and for low shots you cant use your feet to save overall Horrible game would not Recommend just get VRFS Miles better than this bad low quality game

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you didn’t have a positive experience.

(In addition you have a jump button so you can reach higher shots).

Just to clarify, player height in Premier League Player is calibrated to each individual through the Meta headset setup, so the experience should scale to you rather than requiring a specific height.

In terms of using feet for saves, this isn’t currently supported due to hardware and tracking limitations across VR platforms. This is actually consistent across similar titles, including VRFS.

We really appreciate honest feedback like this, as it helps us understand where players are feeling friction. We’re continually working to improve the experience and will take your comments on board as we develop future updates.

Thanks again for giving the game a try.

Best, 
Premier League Player team.

reviews.review_description: It's alright

So I was just playing the game normally then I started trying to draw with multiplayer and never showed up people so I kept having trouble. I restart my game every time every time every time my head was burning and I had to do it again and it still doesn’t work and I was bored super super bored and then we had to play just like solo please fix it then I’ll give it a five stars￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback James2938.  

We're sorry to hear you had trouble finding multiplayer matches, that definitely isn’t the experience we want players to have.

Matchmaking can sometimes be affected by connection stability, player availability, or being on a different game version, so restarting was a good first step. If the issue continues, we’d recommend checking your connection and making sure the game is fully updated.

If you’re still having problems, please reach out to our Community Manager, Luke, on Discord with your headset model, region, and the time you tried to queue so we can investigate properly and help get you into matches.

We’re continuing to improve multiplayer stability and we appreciate you sticking with us ⚽

Best, 
Premier League Player team

developer_response.body:
Hey ROVERSTILLIDIE12345678910, thanks for reaching out.

Premier League Player offers a wide range of free content, including the full 2023/24 season available in Free Levels, a trial pack from the current season, Free Play modes, 30 Shot Stopper levels and 30 Header levels, all at no cost.

From there, any purchase is completely optional. Players can choose to buy an individual Matchweek, a Club Pack, or the Season Pass, which unlocks 350+ levels featuring all teams, stadiums, boots and Moments through to the end of the season.

We hope this keeps you playing and helps you find what you’re looking for.
Feel free to join our Discord to connect with the community.

Best,
Premier League Player Team

developer_response.body:
Hi Libby123, 

Thanks for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear the experience hasn’t landed for you.

Premier League Player is designed around recreating specific, iconic Moments from the Premier League, which is why access to certain matches and roles is structured the way it is. The Season Pass, for example, offers you to relive Moments as the season progresses. 

Premier League Player includes a large amount of content you can access for free, including Free Play, Shot Stopper(GK), Headers, and previous full season of Moments  without needing to purchase anything, so there’s plenty to enjoy right away.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts. 

Best, 
Premier League Player team.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pancake (edited),

Thanks for getting in touch.

The social team will be able to interact directly if you connect with Luke on our Discord.
At the moment, 1v1 shooting isn’t available, but you can play Moments from the 2023/24 season, alongside Headers and Shot Stopper modes. If you’re having any trouble accessing these, please let us know and we’ll be happy to help.

We’re also continuing to add more live goalkeeper Moments, and the Season Pass currently offers around 350 levels, depending on what happens in each matchweek.

Regarding your other point, we can confirm there is no copyrighted music in the game. We hope you enjoy playing and we’re looking forward to engaging with your content.

Best,
Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description:
REASONS WHY THE PREMIER LEAGUE SHOULD ADD PLAYER CAREER MODE TO THEIR GAME 👇
	1.	IT WOULD LET FANS EXPERIENCE THE LIFE OF A PREMIER LEAGUE PLAYER — from academy to superstar.
	2.	PLAYER CAREER MODE MAKES PEOPLE FEEL CONNECTED TO THE LEAGUE AND ITS CLUBS.
	3.	IT GIVES A REAL JOURNEY — TRAINING, CONTRACTS, PRESSURE, AND FAME — JUST LIKE IN REAL LIFE.
	4.	IT WOULD MAKE THE PREMIER LEAGUE GAME DIFFERENT FROM EVERY OTHER FOOTBALL GAME OUT THERE.
	5.	FANS WANT TO FEEL LIKE THEY’RE PART OF THE LEAGUE, NOT JUST WATCHING IT.
	6.	IT WOULD BRING MORE PLAYERS AND ATTENTION TO THE GAME WORLDWIDE.
	7.	YOUNGER FANS LOVE CREATING THEIR OWN PLAYERS AND BUILDING CAREERS.
	8.	IT COULD INCLUDE REAL PREMIER LEAGUE FEATURES — MEDIA, TRANSFERS, TRAINING FACILITIES, AND AWARDS.
	9.	CAREER MODE BUILDS LOYALTY — PEOPLE COME BACK TO THE GAME EVERY SEASON TO CONTINUE THEIR STORY.
	10.	IF THE PREMIER LEAGUE WANTS TO STAND OUT, A FULL PLAYER CAREER MODE IS A MUST.

developer_response.body:
Hi lebronjames2089,

We really appreciate the detailed feedback 👏

We love hearing how much fans want to experience the full journey of a Premier League player. That passion’s exactly what drives us. 

While Career Mode isn’t something we don't offer right now, we’re always listening and exploring new ways to make Premier League Player even better. 

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts. It means a lot⚽

Best, 
Premier League Player team

reviews.review_title: You need to pay to play the game
reviews.review_description: No way ima pay money

developer_response.body:
Hi Callionvr, we just wanted to clarify a small discrepancy in your review.

Premier League Player offers a substantial amount of free content, so players can get match-ready and experience the game before committing to any paid or live content. 

⭐ Free to Play Content ⭐
New players can learn the mechanics, explore different modes, and find their rhythm on the pitch with no payment required. The free offering includes:

- Warm-up mode across multiple stadiums
- 6 trial Moments from the current season
- 1 new trial Moment each week from LIVE content 
- Shot Stopper mode (30 levels)
- Headers mode (30 levels)
- 34 Moments from the 2023/24 season
- 20+ Free Play configurations via Explore Mode
- The Sanctuary, collect and explore player cards and achievements

All of the above is available completely free of charge.

We hope you’ll dip back in, explore the free content on offer, and consider updating your review based on the full experience.

Best,
Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_title: I feel a little lied to... (Edited)
reviews.review_description:
Originally, I used to love this game, I had spent £20 on it, and it was worth it. Until they had recently made it free to play, it had gone downhill from there. I know that we spent it on early access, but the developers had never told us that it would turn free. Another thing that really bothers me is the fact that the people who spent money dont even get anything for it. Now they have made it so you have to buy passes just to get your teams kit. There was no warning on that and this game is very greedy. As for the gameplay it is really fun, but I still feel super robbed and the least they could do is give me a pass for free. I feel super let down on this fact and how I've spent my money poorly on this. As for the game it can be abit janky and have slight weird mechanics and kicking. But its still super fun with tons of things to do, such as goalkeeping and headering.


EDIT: They have given me a whole season pass which makes up for it and its value, originally my review was two stars but I would now like to change it to 5 stars for their apology and gift. Thank you so much, Premier League Player. For understanding how the people feel. I hope the game gets it credit it deserves. Thanks again for your understandment.

developer_response.body:
Hi teddythfc,

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts. We’re sorry to hear you feel disappointed, especially as someone who supported the game early on. We understand how frustrating it can feel when a game you’ve invested in changes direction.

When we moved to free-to-play, the aim was to open the experience to as many fans as possible and not to leave early supporters behind. We've always explored ways in which we can recognise and reward the players who were part of the original journey first. 

As a thank you, we’d like to give you FOUR free weeks of Matchweek. You can redeem your free weeks by joining us on Discord, or simply use this personal code in the store: MW270825-24A9A1.

It’s also important to us that the core gameplay remains fun and accessible to everyone, and we’re glad you still enjoyed that side of it.

Your voice matters, and we don’t take it lightly. We're actively looking to give back to fans and we've never lied or promised anything we didn't deliver on. 

Thanks again for sharing your perspective. It helps us build a better experience for all players.
—The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: It is really realistic

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback. 

We're really glad to hear you're enjoying Premier League Player.

Appreciate you playing and we hope you keep enjoying it

Best, 
Premier League Player team ⚽️

reviews.review_title: Paid £20 for a free game, not happy!
reviews.review_description:
Game is pretty well designed and I do enjoy reliving moments from the beautiful game and practicing kicking with my hands (as daft as that sounds!) but do feel slightly let down that I paid a full £20 for this game only a few months ago and when it released from early access, I don’t think I received anything as an early adopter?? Was very surprised to load up the game to find nearly everything locked behind ANOTHER PAYWALL!

I get that this day and age, every game relies on micro transactions to stay afloat but to not reward your early adopters I think is quite shoddy.

Only giving 2 stars as I feel let down as an early consumer but for how good the game is, I have to give them credit where it’s due.

developer_response.body:
Hi there 👋 

Thanks so much for taking the time to share your feedback and for supporting Premier League Player from the very beginning. We really appreciate you being an early adopter and totally understand your frustration.

We’d love to make this right and ensure you’re properly rewarded for being part of our early community. Could you please reach out to our team on Discord or contact our Community Manager, Luke, on Luke@rezzil.com, so we can take care of this for you?

Thanks again for your support and for helping us make Premier League Player even better ⚽

Best
The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: I bought the game when it first came out for 20£ and now it has become free to play in now have to pay another 40£ just to play new levels definitely not worth for early access players

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for sharing your feedback. We completely understand the frustration.

If you purchased the game at launch, you’re entitled to a Season Pass at no extra cost. 

Just reach out to our Community Manager, Luke, in our Discord and he’ll be able to validate your purchase and provide you with a code. That will give you access to the full season for free.

We’ve shared this across our socials too, but we want to make sure no early players miss out.

See you in the Discord!

Best, 
Premier League Player team

reviews.review_description: I really love the game, it’s smooth, good physics, and great goalie physics. But here’s the downside the shooting in the game makes the ball rocket even if you put barely any power on it I’ve tried every way to shoot and it still rockets over the goal I stopped leaning back but that didn’t help. Also the game has good free content but add free seasons that we can play for our clubs. Also add more levels and fix the physics by fixing the shooting. Also I would be glad to see yall make free seasons for the F2P users. Because having better content for the people that want to pay should be optional even if you hav training and levels for the free users. It would be a good game if you did all of these to improve the free to play experience.

developer_response.body:
Hi KylandVR12, 

Thanks for taking the time to leave such detailed feedback, we really appreciate it.

We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the overall feel of the game, especially the physics and goalkeeping. That’s great to hear.

On shooting, this is something we’re actively monitoring. Shot power is influenced by a few factors (including timing and contact). Feedback like this is really helpful for the team as we continue to refine and improve how it feels on the pitch.

Premium content helps us keep building and supporting the game, but we agree that the free experience should still feel rewarding and fun.

Thanks again for the honest review. We’re continuing to improve Premier League Player, and feedback like yours plays a big part in shaping what comes next.

Best, 
Premier League Player team

Hi Ahmed60103,

reviews.review_description:
Being a fan of football (specifically the Premier League) and virtual reality, this game combines two things I love and delivers a fantastic virtual experience. Whether I’m hitting top bins in training or reliving past premier league moments - it captures the essence of football so well. 

I don’t think I’ve sweat as much on vr as I have when I’ve used the ‘Shot Stopper’ mode but when I finally manage to save the ‘Real shot’ it honestly feels so rewarding.

My only complaint would be that the Meta tech hasn’t allowed for foot tracking as the hands for football boots takes some getting used to and can break immersion. Here’s hoping that they can introduce that tech soon 🤞

developer_response.body:
Hi IIDewsyboiII,

Thank you for such a brilliant review. 

It’s great to hear how much you’re enjoying Premier League Player and how Shot Stopper is keeping you on your toes. We designed the game to capture the intensity and reward of real football moments, so it’s fantastic to know it’s hitting the mark. We can’t wait to bring you even more ways to experience the game.

All the best, 
Premier League Player team

reviews.review_description: Honestly, because of all the ladies, I was expecting to see something amazing all it is is passing the ball. I’ve never even shot it and it’s very boring. The mechanics aren’t even good. It’s mainly just literally your hands or legs. I was expecting this to be as diverse as VRF, but it’s really disappointing.

developer_response.body:
Hi SigmaCris,

Thanks for giving Premier League Player a try and for sharing your thoughts. We’re sorry to hear the experience didn’t live up to your expectations. Premier League Player focuses on recreating real Premier League goals and moments, so the gameplay is designed around those scenarios. Also, we do have the Header and Shot Stopper game modes aimed to provide a different experience. 

That said, your feedback on mechanics and gameplay depth is really valuable, and we’ll make sure it’s passed along to the team as we continue to refine the experience. We want every fan to feel the excitement of being on the pitch, and your comments help us get closer to that.

—The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_title: Add an Aston Villa team pack
reviews.review_description: This is almost 5 stars but without my team having a team pack as one of the biggest teams in england its a bit biased

developer_response.body:
Hi CALonMETA,

Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. We really appreciate it.

Just to let you know, Aston Villa is included in the game and featured throughout. It sounds like it may have been missed, but we’re more than happy to help you find it.

If you’d like, you can email us at info@rezzil.com, and we can send over a quick snapshot or video showing exactly where to access it. 

You can also jump into our Discord and the community (or team) will happily guide you.

Every Premier League club is represented, and The Villa is definitely one of them 💜

Thanks again for the feedback. 

Best, 
Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: People are complaining about the game going from £20 to free. bananalord777,

As a thank you for supporting the game, we’re giving you FOUR free weeks of Matchweek, which you can redeem using this code: MW270825-24A9A1.

Hi MilkyCremeGT,

Thanks for sharing your feedback, we really appreciate the thoughtful suggestions! Ideas like adding momentum to goalkeeper jumps and exploring full matches are great, and we’ll pass them on to the development team as we continue refining the game.

You can redeem four weeks of Matchweek for free. Just join us on Discord to access the code. Alternatively, as a thank you, you can redeem using this code: MW270825-24A9A1.

Best,

reviews.review_title: Good game but could be slightly improved
reviews.review_description: This is a very good game which is fun to play at any time, however i feel sometimes the goalkeeper mode can be slightly difficult. When you are playing the goalkeeper mode it can be very difficult to save some of the shots, and in the player mode it can be quite difficult to angle the ball the correct direction at times. Overall i feel like it is a very good game but i feel like some slight changes to the modes ie perhaps a more easier setting for new players it could become an even better game

developer_response.body:
Hi mlloyd10,

Thanks for your feedback. 

We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying Premier League Player. We try to make the game balanced for both new and experienced players, so the higher levels on both Shot Stopper and Moments can sometimes be more challenging. 

Thank you for sharing your thoughts, as your insights help us understand what players enjoy and what can be tricky.

If you have any specific feedback or ideas, join us on Discord and share your thoughts with the community. We’d love to hear from you⚽

Thank you, 
The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description:
It’s ok and fun but the gameplay is clunky, nothing like vrfs. You can barely do a curver and there is no technique to hit the ball, so it’s kinda just hit and hope some of the time. Other than that it’s fun to play with friends. It not perfect, and nothing like VRFS. But still, give it a try for urself 😁

Also PLEASE PLEASE make the gameplay like VRFS

developer_response.body:
Hi lucas.01062011,

Thanks for sharing your honest thoughts with us. We really appreciate the mix of both positives and where you feel things could be better. We’re glad you’re having fun with friends, but we hear you loud and clear. 

While our approach isn’t identical to VRFS, our goal is the same: to give players as much control, precision, and realism as possible.

It means a lot that you’d still recommend others give it a try, and we’ll keep pushing updates to make sure the experience feels smoother and more rewarding.

Thanks again for taking the time to let us know. If you have specific feedback that you want to relay to the Dev team, please join us on Discord and share your detailed thoughts on there. 

Thanks,
—The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and I feel like the only way to make it better is making a mode where you can actually play matches and move your own character however I know that will take long so another thing that I think you guys should add is like hand wrap  and gloves on the customization part it would be so cool and make your character look better anyways this game is really fun and I hope you read this because it is litteraly my favorite vr game

reviews.review_title: Official Football Game Fun and Unique
reviews.review_description: Very entertaining to play in a larger space, glad they added smooth turn and a bit of free movement to the gameplay which makes it playable in a smaller space but still need enough space to swing arms about as they are your legs. As far as I can see you don't play a full match but highlights or Moments as they are called in game from real matches of the 24/25 season. The animations of players are very good and there are many and the structure of the game is fun to play trying to get the complete the real match move just right. I would like to see smooth turn and movement in the museum part of the game rather that teleport and click turn. I would also like to see the 25/26 season brought to PSVR2 with higher detailed textures for the kits and what have you as it is quite something wearing your teams home, away and goal keeper kits playing with official balls without having to spend 80 quid a pop. Perhaps add the third kits as well. Some teams have forth kits I believe. It would be nice to see the greatly rendered to scale stadiums in even finer detail. Very entertaining officially licensed game which I was surprised to see. It must have cost them a few quid.

developer_response.body:
Hi JonnyJamesC,

Thank you for the detailed and thoughtful review. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback.

We’re pleased to hear you’re enjoying the experience. Your suggestions are incredibly helpful. We’re always working to improve the experience, and feedback like yours is key in guiding that development.

If you haven’t already, feel free to join our Discord to connect with the community and stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates.

Thanks again for your support and for being part of the Premier League Player journey.
— The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: When i was calibrating my hands the feet would go very wonky and not playable so it needs to be fixed but other than that very fun game

developer_response.body:
Hi Corepoo,

Thanks so much for the kind review. We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game!

We’ve recently introduced a new calibration system to help make sure your feet are straight. If they appear wonky, just hit “Retry” until they line up properly. The most important thing is to stand up straight and keep your hands directly by your sides during calibration.

Appreciate you playing and taking the time to share your feedback.

— The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: The game is good nothing wrong with it was upset to find out it went free to play but after they’ve explained it’s all been sorted out

developer_response.body:
Hi Wu_Warrior,


The shift to Free to Play was made to grow our community and make the experience of playing Premier League football in VR more accessible to everyone. Our focus has always been on creating a unique, immersive game that brings the feel of elite-level football into VR in a way that’s accessible, fun and rewarding for all of our valued community.

To show our appreciation for early supporters, all players who purchased the game before the transition will receive exclusive DLC at no additional cost. 

We remain committed to transparency, fairness, and building a game that our community can be proud of. We value your feedback and welcome further discussion if you have more questions.

Thank you again for your honest input. It helps us improve and shape the future of the game.

Thanks,
The Premier League Player Team

Regarding the issue you're having with creating a multiplayer lobby in Headers or Shot Stopper, this could be linked to a connection or platform-specific bug. We'd love to get this sorted for you. 

Firstly, please make sure your game is updated to the latest version and try restarting your headset.

If the issue persists, feel free to reach out to us directly at info@rezzil.com or directly on Discord with your headset type and any error messages you’re seeing, and we’ll get you playing with your friends in no time!

As a thank you for supporting the game, we’re giving you FOUR free weeks of Matchweek, which you can redeem using this code: MW270825-24A9A1. 

Thanks again for your support!
The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: Awful I was looking forward to playing this game but I couldnt even load into the game

developer_response.body:
Hi KSquires99,

Sorry to hear you’ve had trouble getting into the game. We totally get how frustrating that must be. A few things to check that might help:
- Storage space: Make sure you’ve got enough free space on your headset — we recommend at least 2GB available.
- Restart the game: Try closing and reopening the app fully. A quick restart can often sort it.
- Reboot your headset: This can help clear up any system glitches that might be causing issues.

If you're still stuck, feel free to reach out to us at info@rezzil.com or join us on Discord, and we’ll be happy to look into it further.

As a result, we’re giving you FOUR free weeks of Matchweek, which you can redeem using this code: MW270825-24A9A1.

We hope you’ll be up and playing soon ⚽

Best, 
Premier League Player team

Hi Erncamps2013,

We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback.

The shift to Free to Play was made to grow our community and make the experience of playing Premier League football in VR more accessible to everyone. Our focus has always been on creating a unique, immersive game that brings the feel of elite-level football into VR in a way that’s accessible, fun and rewarding for all of our valued community.

To show our appreciation for early supporters, all players who purchased the game before the transition will receive exclusive DLC at no additional cost. We want to be clear: there are no randomised rewards, no cosmetic monetisation, and we have never charged anyone twice.

We remain committed to transparency, fairness, and building a game that our community can be proud of. We value your feedback and welcome further discussion if you have more questions.

Thank you again for your honest input. It helps us improve and shape the future of the game.

reviews.review_description: Clunky controls, ball frequently goes through your hands in gk mode, and the actual gameplay is just vrfs without moving.

developer_response.body:
Hi Minkki3, 

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear the experience didn’t meet your expectations.

We’re continuously refining the controls and overall gameplay, and feedback like yours is a big part of that process. In goalkeeper mode specifically, hand tracking has been carefully tuned, and while occasional misses can happen depending on timing and positioning, the ball shouldn’t frequently pass through your hands. 

We’d love to hear more about the setup or context if you’re open to sharing; it helps us identify edge cases and make improvements. If you’d like to stay updated or be part of the conversation, feel free to join our Discord community, and we can help you there. 

As a result, we’re giving you FOUR free weeks of Matchweek, which you can redeem using this code: MW270825-24A9A1. 

Thanks again for your feedback.
— The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_title: A lot of depth, but one problem
reviews.review_description: This game has SO much depth and features to keep me entertained for a long time, the moments mode is incredibly executed and the goalkeeping mode is the best I’ve played. Although, from playing many football games on vr, most notably VRFS, the only thing stopping me from playing this game longer is the physics of the ball. I don’t know what it is or if it’s a problem for me but out of all the games I’ve  the physics feel far too floaty, I mean I could tap the ball and it could go flying into row z and if I go any softer it goes nowhere, overall it’s just more  than anything in my opinion making the ball a bit weightier or-even adding a slider to adjust how hard you need to hit the ball for it to go far much like vr basketball games would go a LONG way. But apart from that this game is incredibly fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi MacandcheeseM,

Thanks so much for your detailed feedback. We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying Moments and Goalkeeping mode. It’s great to know the game is keeping you entertained.

We’ve taken your feedback on the ball physics on board, and we’ve since released a physics update to make the ball feel more natural and responsive. We hope this makes the gameplay feel even closer to real football.

As a reminder, the game is now free-to-play on Meta Quest, and you can also claim FOUR free weeks of Matchweek using this code: MW270825-24A9A1.

We hope you enjoy the improvements and look forward to hearing what you think!

Best,
The Premier League Player Team

reviews.review_description: Very good game it’s super realistic and actually feels like your in the game it is a must buy

developer_response.body:
Smazza

Many thanks for the kind words!!! Please join our Discord and hope to see you in game and leader boards.

REZZIL- PLP Dev

reviews.review_description: I can’t get on to it but looks like an unbelievable game

developer_response.body:
Hi HarryShelts11,

Thanks for your message! Great news, the game is now free-to-play, so you can jump straight in and experience all the action.

As a thank you for joining us, you can also enjoy FOUR free weeks of Matchweek using this code: MW270825-24A9A1.

We hope you enjoy getting closer to the Premier League on the pitch!

Best,
The Premier League Player Team
